children.text: After breakfast, my mother and I went to the supermarket.
children.translation: 吃过早餐后，我妈妈和我去了超市。

children.text: We saw a lot of foods and drinks there.
children.translation: 我们在那里看到了很多食物和饮料。

children.text: We bought many things for my birthday party.
children.translation: 我们为我的生日派对买了很多东西。

children.text: In the afternoon, we decorated the room with balloons.
children.translation: 下午，我们用气球装饰了房间。

children.text: In the evening, we had a big dinner and I got many birthday gifts from my parents and friends.
children.translation: 晚上，我们吃了一顿丰盛的晚餐，我收到了来自父母和朋友的许多生日礼物。
children.highlight: had a big dinner, got, birthday gifts

children.text: Then, I made a wish and blew out the candles on the birthday cake.
children.translation: 然后，我许了一个愿，吹灭了生日蛋糕上的蜡烛。
children.highlight: made a wish, blew out, birthday cake

children.text: I enjoyed my birthday very much.
After breakfast, my mother and I went to the supermarket to prepare for my party.
children.translation: 吃过早餐后，我妈妈和我去超市为我的派对做准备。

children.text: We saw various kinds of foods and drinks there, and we bought a lot of things such as balloons, chocolates, and a pizza.
children.translation: 我们在那里看到了各种各样的食物和饮料，我们买了很多东西，比如气球、巧克力和比萨饼。
children.highlight: various kinds of, bought a lot of, such as

children.text: In the evening, my family had a big dinner together, and I was excited to get many birthday gifts.
children.translation: 晚上，我的家人一起吃了一顿丰盛的晚餐，收到很多生日礼物我感到很兴奋。
children.highlight: had a big dinner, excited to, birthday gifts

children.text: After that, I made a wish and blew out the candles on my favorite chocolate cake while my father took photos for us.
children.translation: 在那之后，我许了个愿，吹灭了我最喜欢的巧克力蛋糕上的蜡烛，同时我爸爸为我们拍了照。
children.highlight: After that, made a wish, blew out, favorite, while, took photos

children.text: It was a wonderful day that I will never forget.
children.translation: 这是一个我永远不会忘记的美妙的一天。
